ddls:
CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "work_year" TEXT /* Year and month of the work period */,
  "experience_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experience level */,
  "employment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment type */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary in the original currency */,
  "salary_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salary currency */,
  "salary_in_usd" INTEGER /* Annual salary converted to USD */,
  "employee_residence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's residence location */,
  "remote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the remote work policy */,
  "company_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company's location */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date when the salary became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the salary record ends */,
  "salary_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the salary (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Any additional bonus or performance-based pay */,
  "benefits_value" REAL /* Total value of benefits provided to the employee */,
  "currency_exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used to convert the salary to USD */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_salary_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("salary_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_experience_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("experience_level_id") REFERENCES experience_levels ("experience_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_residence_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_residence_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_remote_id FOREIGN KEY ("remote_id") REFERENCES remote_work ("remote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_type_id") REFERENCES employment_types ("employment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_company_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the company (if applicable) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the employee works */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company's location */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_company_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job responsibilities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experience_levels" (
  "experience_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience level */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Level of experience (e.g., Mid level, Senior level) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experience level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_types" (
  "employment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment type */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., Full-time, Part-time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, €) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country (e.g., DE, US) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remote_work" (
  "remote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remote work policy */,
  "remote_ratio" INTEGER /* Percentage of work done remotely (0-100) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the remote work policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remote_id")
)
